title: Hähnchenmist in der Biogasanlage zur Reduktion der Treibhausgase
subtitle: BroilerNet Factsheet S1_C1_2
description: A factsheet presenting the use of chicken manure in biogas plants to reduce agricultural emissions of methane and nitrous oxide through anaerobic digestion. It discusses process benefits, challenges and energy substitution potential for improving sustainability in poultry farming.
